Query.Sql: with hn as ( select Record ->> '$.HeadNeck.HeadNeckCore.HeadNeckCoreLinkagePatientId.NHSNumber.@extension' as NHSNumber, unnest([ [Record ->> '$.HeadNeck.HeadNeckCore.HeadNeckCoreTreatment.HeadNeckCoreSurgeryAndOtherProcedures.PrimaryProcedureOPCS.@code'], Record ->> '$.HeadNeck.HeadNeckCore.HeadNeckCoreTreatment[*].HeadNeckCoreSurgeryAndOtherProcedures.PrimaryProcedureOPCS.@code' ], recursive := true) as PrimaryProcedureOPCS, unnest([ [Record ->> '$.HeadNeck.HeadNeckCore.HeadNeckCoreTreatment.HeadNeckCoreSurgeryAndOtherProcedures.ProcedureDate'], Record ->> '$.HeadNeck.HeadNeckCore.HeadNeckCoreTreatment[*].HeadNeckCoreSurgeryAndOtherProcedures.ProcedureDate' ], recursive := true) as ProcedureDate from omop_staging.cosd_staging_81 where type = 'HN' ) select distinct NHSNumber, PrimaryProcedureOPCS, ProcedureDate from hn where NHSNumber is not null and PrimaryProcedureOPCS is not null and ProcedureDate is not null;

Explanation.Description: OPCS Classification of Interventions and Procedures code used to identify the primary patient procedure carried out.
Date relevant to the activity for the procedure date.
